tog.name: Celaena Sardothien
tog.bio: A renowned assassin imprisoned in Endovier and chosen to compete for the position of King’s Champion.

tog.name: Chaol Westfall
tog.bio: Captain of the Guard and the officer responsible for escorting and training Celaena.

tog.name: Dorian Havilliard
tog.bio: Crown Prince of Adarlan and Celaena’s sponsor in the Champion competition.

tog.name: The King of Adarlan
tog.bio: The ruler of Adarlan and the person seeking a new Champion.

tog.name: Cain
tog.bio: A powerful competitor who quickly appears to be one of Celaena’s greatest physical threats.

tog.name: Princess Nehemia
tog.bio: A princess of Eyllwe visiting the Adarlanian court.

tog.name: Duke Perrington
tog.bio: A powerful duke involved in arranging the Champion competition.

tog.name: Nox Owen
tog.bio: A skilled thief competing for the position of King’s Champion.

tog.name: Pelor
tog.bio: A young assassin entered in the royal competition.

tog.name: Grave
tog.bio: A feared assassin and one of the more dangerous contestants.

tog.name: Kaltain Rompier
tog.bio: A courtier pursuing influence and a royal marriage.

tog.name: Philippa Spindlehead
tog.bio: A member of Celaena’s household staff in the glass castle.

com.name: Celaena Sardothien
com.bio: The king’s newly appointed Champion, carrying out secret assignments for the crown.

com.name: Chaol Westfall
com.bio: Captain of the Guard and one of Celaena’s closest connections at court.

com.name: Dorian Havilliard
com.bio: Crown Prince of Adarlan, increasingly aware that the kingdom holds secrets of its own.

com.name: Princess Nehemia
com.bio: Princess of Eyllwe and Celaena’s trusted friend.

com.name: Archer Finn
com.bio: A former acquaintance of Celaena who becomes connected to one of her assignments.

com.name: Mort
com.bio: A talking bronze door knocker guarding an old passage beneath the castle.

tab.name: Celaena Sardothien
tab.bio: A gifted teenage assassin beginning to question the life chosen for her.

tab.name: Sam Cortland
tab.bio: Celaena’s fellow assassin and longtime rival within the Guild.

tab.name: Arobynn Hamel
tab.bio: King of the Assassins and the controlling head of Celaena’s guild.

tab.name: Captain Rolfe
tab.bio: The Pirate Lord who controls Skull’s Bay and its trade.

tab.name: Ansel of Briarcliff
tab.bio: A young assassin Celaena befriends while training in the Red Desert.

tab.name: The Mute Master
tab.bio: The respected leader of the Silent Assassins.

tab.name: Yrene Towers
tab.bio: A young healer whose plans have stalled far from home.

tab.name: Lysandra
tab.bio: A courtesan from Celaena’s past whose path intersects with the Guild.

hof.name: Celaena Sardothien
hof.bio: An assassin sent to Wendlyn while carrying grief and secrets she can no longer avoid.

hof.name: Rowan Whitethorn
hof.bio: A powerful Fae warrior ordered to train Celaena.

hof.name: Maeve
hof.bio: Queen of the Fae in Doranelle and Rowan’s ruler.

hof.name: Emrys
hof.bio: A warmhearted storyteller and cook at Mistward.

hof.name: Luca
hof.bio: A young demi-Fae living and working at Mistward.

hof.name: Manon Blackbeak
hof.bio: Heir to the Blackbeak witch clan and leader of the Thirteen.

hof.name: Asterin Blackbeak
hof.bio: Manon’s second-in-command and a member of the Thirteen.

hof.name: Aedion Ashryver
hof.bio: A celebrated general known as the Wolf of the North.

hof.name: Sorscha
hof.bio: A healer serving within the royal castle.

qos.name: Aelin Galathynius
qos.bio: The heir of Terrasen returns to Rifthold with unfinished plans and debts.

qos.name: Aedion Ashryver
qos.bio: The Wolf of the North and a key figure in Terrasen’s resistance.

qos.name: Rowan Whitethorn
qos.bio: A Fae warrior bound to Aelin by loyalty and shared purpose.

qos.name: Lysandra
qos.bio: A courtesan with a complicated history involving Aelin and Arobynn.

qos.name: Manon Blackbeak
qos.bio: Wing Leader of the Ironteeth witches at Morath.

qos.name: Elide Lochan
qos.bio: A young woman held at Morath who watches its growing horrors closely.

qos.name: Nesryn Faliq
qos.bio: A skilled guard and archer working alongside Chaol.

qos.name: Arobynn Hamel
qos.bio: King of the Assassins and a dangerous figure from Aelin’s past.

eos.name: Aelin Galathynius
eos.bio: Queen of Terrasen, seeking allies and armies for the war ahead.

eos.name: Rowan Whitethorn
eos.bio: Aelin’s Fae ally and a member of her growing court.

eos.name: Aedion Ashryver
eos.bio: General of the Bane and member of Aelin’s court.

eos.name: Lysandra
eos.bio: A shapeshifter allied with Aelin and Terrasen.

eos.name: Manon Blackbeak
eos.bio: Leader of the Thirteen, confronting new questions about witches and loyalty.

eos.name: Elide Lochan
eos.bio: Lady of Perranth, attempting to escape Morath and find Aelin.

eos.name: Lorcan Salvaterre
eos.bio: A formidable Fae warrior pursuing his own mission.

eos.name: Dorian Havilliard
eos.bio: King of Adarlan, learning to control his magic while joining the wider fight.

tod.name: Chaol Westfall
tod.bio: The former Captain of the Guard travels to Antica seeking healing and an alliance.

tod.name: Nesryn Faliq
tod.bio: A skilled archer returning to the Southern Continent as part of the diplomatic mission.

tod.name: Yrene Towers
tod.bio: A gifted healer of the Torre Cesme assigned to evaluate Chaol.

tod.name: Sartaq
tod.bio: A ruk-riding prince of the khaganate.

tod.name: Hasar
tod.bio: A politically sharp princess of the khaganate.

tod.name: Kashin
tod.bio: A prince of the khaganate and member of the royal family.

tod.name: Nesryn’s family
tod.bio: Relatives who reconnect Nesryn with her family’s life in the Southern Continent.

koa.name: Aelin Galathynius
koa.bio: Queen of Terrasen as the final war for Erilea begins.

koa.name: Rowan Whitethorn
koa.bio: Aelin’s mate and one of the leaders searching for her.

koa.name: Lysandra
koa.bio: A shapeshifter fighting beside the armies of Terrasen.

koa.name: Manon Blackbeak
koa.bio: Leader of the Thirteen, seeking a future for the witch clans.

koa.name: Dorian Havilliard
koa.bio: King of Adarlan, using his magic and political judgment in the final campaign.

koa.name: Elide Lochan
koa.bio: Lady of Perranth and member of Aelin’s court.

koa.name: Yrene Towers
koa.bio: A powerful healer joining the war against Erawan.

acotar1.name: Feyre Archeron
acotar1.bio: A human huntress supporting her family near the wall.

acotar1.name: Elain Archeron
acotar1.bio: Feyre’s sister, known for her gentler disposition.

acotar1.name: Tamlin
acotar1.bio: A powerful faerie lord associated with the Spring Court.

acotar1.name: Lucien
acotar1.bio: A sharp-tongued member of the Spring Court.

acotar1.name: Feyre’s father
acotar1.bio: The Archeron sisters’ father, whose lost fortune left the family in poverty.

acotar1.name: Andras
acotar1.bio: The wolf Feyre kills while hunting near the wall.

acotar1.name: Alis
acotar1.bio: A servant in Tamlin’s household who helps Feyre understand life in Prythian.

acotar1.name: The Suriel
acotar1.bio: A dangerous faerie creature known for answering questions when trapped.

acotar1.name: Rhysand
acotar1.bio: A mysterious High Fae male from the Night Court.

acotar1.name: Amarantha
acotar1.bio: A powerful figure connected to the curse afflicting Prythian.

acomaf.name: Feyre Archeron
acomaf.bio: A newly Made High Fae struggling with trauma and the life awaiting her.

acomaf.name: Rhysand
acomaf.bio: High Lord of the Night Court and holder of a bargain with Feyre.

acomaf.name: Morrigan
acomaf.bio: A powerful member of Rhysand’s inner circle, commonly called Mor.

acomaf.name: Cassian
acomaf.bio: An Illyrian warrior and commander in the Night Court.

acomaf.name: Azriel
acomaf.bio: The Night Court’s shadowsinger and spymaster.

acomaf.name: Amren
acomaf.bio: An ancient and formidable member of Rhysand’s inner circle.

acowar.name: Feyre Archeron
acowar.bio: A central member of the Night Court preparing for war.

acowar.name: Rhysand
acowar.bio: High Lord of the Night Court working to unite Prythian.

acowar.name: Lucien
acowar.bio: A former Spring Court emissary navigating divided loyalties.

acowar.name: Nesta Archeron
acowar.bio: Feyre’s eldest sister, changed by the events of the previous book.

acowar.name: Elain Archeron
acowar.bio: Feyre’s sister, also changed by the events of the previous book.

acowar.name: Tarquin
acowar.bio: High Lord of the Summer Court.

acofas.name: Feyre Archeron
acofas.bio: Helping rebuild Velaris while preparing for the Winter Solstice.

acofas.name: Rhysand
acofas.bio: High Lord of the Night Court during the postwar recovery.

acofas.name: Nesta Archeron
acofas.bio: Living apart from much of the Inner Circle after the war.

acofas.name: Cassian
acofas.bio: An Illyrian commander concerned about both recovery and unfinished tensions.

acosf.name: Nesta Archeron
acosf.bio: At the center of a difficult journey through trauma, anger, and recovery.

acosf.name: Cassian
acosf.bio: An Illyrian general tasked with overseeing Nesta’s training.

acosf.name: Gwyneth Berdara
acosf.bio: A priestess in the library beneath the House of Wind.

acosf.name: Emerie
acosf.bio: An Illyrian shopkeeper who becomes part of Nesta’s growing circle.

acosf.name: Clotho
acosf.bio: A priestess who oversees the library beneath the House of Wind.

hoeab.name: Bryce Quinlan
hoeab.bio: A young woman living in Lunathion whose life is transformed by a devastating crime.

hoeab.name: Danika Fendyr
hoeab.bio: Bryce’s closest friend and leader of the Pack of Devils.

hoeab.name: Hunt Athalar
hoeab.bio: A powerful angel assigned to work with Bryce.

hoeab.name: Fury Axtar
hoeab.bio: A formidable mercenary and one of Bryce’s closest friends.

hoeab.name: Juniper Andromeda
hoeab.bio: A talented dancer and one of Bryce’s closest friends.

hoeab.name: Connor Holstrom
hoeab.bio: A wolf-shifter in Danika’s pack with a longstanding connection to Bryce.

hoeab.name: Ithan Holstrom
hoeab.bio: Connor’s younger brother and a promising sunball player.

hoeab.name: Ruhn Danaan
hoeab.bio: Bryce’s Fae half-brother and a prince of the Valbaran Fae.

hoeab.name: Jesiba Roga
hoeab.bio: A powerful sorceress and Bryce’s demanding employer.

hoeab.name: Lehabah
hoeab.bio: A fire sprite who works in the antiquities gallery with Bryce.

hoeab.name: Isaiah Tiberian
hoeab.bio: An angel and commander serving in Lunathion.

hoeab.name: Sabine Fendyr
hoeab.bio: Danika’s mother and the Prime Apparent of the wolves.

hosab.name: Bryce Quinlan
hosab.bio: Trying to build a quieter life while new conflicts gather around her.

hosab.name: Hunt Athalar
hosab.bio: An angel seeking freedom and a future with Bryce.

hosab.name: Ruhn Danaan
hosab.bio: Bryce’s brother and a prince drawn into the growing rebellion.

hosab.name: Ithan Holstrom
hosab.bio: A wolf-shifter searching for purpose after the events of the first book.

hosab.name: Tharion Ketos
hosab.bio: A mer warrior and investigator serving the River Queen.

hosab.name: Cormac Donnall
hosab.bio: An Avallen prince whose arrival complicates Bryce’s plans.

hosab.name: Lidia Cervos
hosab.bio: The Hind, a feared officer serving the Asteri.

hofas.name: Bryce Quinlan
hofas.bio: Separated from her home and searching for a path back to Midgard.

hofas.name: Hunt Athalar
hofas.bio: Facing the consequences of the group’s rebellion against the Asteri.

hofas.name: Ruhn Danaan
hofas.bio: A captive prince of the Valbaran Fae.

hofas.name: Lidia Cervos
hofas.bio: The Hind, whose loyalties and history carry major consequences.

hofas.name: Nesta Archeron
hofas.bio: A warrior Bryce encounters after crossing into another world.

hofas.name: Azriel
hofas.bio: A shadowsinger who encounters Bryce in Prythian.
